description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a light-colored brick exterior and a flat roof, featuring a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and landscaped greenery. The front facade includes a driveway leading to a two-car garage, a small garden bed, and a main entrance with adjacent windows. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically around the building, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The backyard is enclosed by a fence and includes mature trees, a paved patio area, and decorative planters. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen spaces, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, brick exterior, large windows, a two-car garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: View 0 highlights the backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, lush landscaping, and the rear facade of the bungalow.
description_view_1: View 1 shows the side of the bungalow, emphasizing the pool area, patio, and the arrangement of windows along the brick wall.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the front of the bungalow, featuring the driveway, two-car garage, main entrance, and a small garden bed.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side of the bungalow, displaying the pool, patio, and a side entrance with additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
